memoryArtifacts.headline: Biography Michael "The Wizard" Scott
memoryArtifacts.description:
Biography (Edit)

About Sir Michael Scott of Balwearie
Michael "the Wizard" Scott of Balwearie (Latin: Michael Scotus) (1175-c1232) was a Scottish alchemist, astrologer, mathematician, and scholar.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Michael Scott Second Lord of Balwearie於1249年出生在蘇格蘭費伏吉卡爾迪時，他的父親Sir Michael Scott 1st of Balwearie32歲，母親Margaret of Balwearie27歲。他和Lady Margaret Balweary至少有3個兒子。他去世於1304年在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏吉卡爾迪。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Michael Scott Second Lord of Balwearie was born in 1249, in Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland, his father, Sir Michael Scott 1st of Balwearie, was 32 and his mother, Margaret of Balwearie, was 27. He had at least 3 sons with Lady Margaret Balweary. He died in 1304, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Michael Scott Second Lord of Balwearie est né en 1249, à Kirkcaldy, Fife, Écosse, son père, Sir Michael Scott 1st of Balwearie, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret of Balwearie, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Lady Margaret Balweary. Il est décédé en 1304, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Kirkcaldy, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Michael Scott Second Lord of Balwearie 1249 in Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Michael Scott 1st of Balwearie 32 und seine Mutter Margaret of Balwearie 27. Er hatte mit Lady Margaret Balweary mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1304 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kirkcaldy, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Lady Margaret Balweary. Morì nel 1304, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Michael Scott Second Lord of Balwearieが1249年にスコットランドフィフキルクカルディで生まれた時，父Sir Michael Scott 1st of Balwearieは32歳，母Margaret of Balwearieは27歳であった。彼はLady Margaret Balwearyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1304年に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドフィフキルクカルディにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Michael Scott Second Lord of Balwearie(이)가 1249년 스컷랜드 피프 커k캘디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Michael Scott 1st of Balwearie(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret of Balwearie(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Lady Margaret Balweary(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1304년 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 커k캘디에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Michael Scott Second Lord of Balwearie родился в 1249 г. в местности кирккалди, фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Michael Scott 1st of Balwearie было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret of Balwearie, 27. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Lady Margaret Balweary. Он умер в 1304 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности кирккалди, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.
